objectSets.name: First Pass - Insert/Upsert with Draft Status

objects.query: SELECT DeveloperName, Language, MasterLabel FROM AssessmentQuestionConfig
SELECT DeveloperName, Language, MasterLabel FROM AssessmentQuestionSetConfig

SELECT ActiveVersionId, CurrencyIsoCode, DataType, Description, DeveloperName, Name, QuestionCategory, QuestionText, RelatedQuestionId, ShouldExcludeFromMetadata, ShouldHideInDesigner, UniqueIndex FROM AssessmentQuestion
SELECT DeveloperName, Name, UniqueIndex FROM AssessmentQuestionSet

SELECT AdditionalInformation, AssessmentQuestion.UniqueIndex, CurrencyIsoCode, DataType, DeactivationDateTime, Description, ExternalAsmtContentVersion, GuidanceInformation, HelpText, IsActive, IsOptionSourceResponseValue, Name, QuestionText, ResponseValues, Status, VersionNumber FROM AssessmentQuestionVersion WHERE Status = 'Active'

SELECT IsMetadataCacheDisabled, IsTestProcedure, Description, OverrideKey, Name, OmniProcessKey, Language, PropertySetConfig, LastPreviewPage, OmniProcessType, ElementTypeComponentMapping, SubType, ResponseCacheType, IsOmniScriptEmbeddable, CustomJavaScript, IsIntegrationProcedure, VersionNumber, DesignerCustomizationType, Namespace, Type, RequiredPermission, WebComponentKey, IsWebCompEnabled, UniqueName FROM OmniProcess WHERE OmniProcessType='Omniscript'
SELECT DeveloperName, Language, MasterLabel FROM OmniScriptConfig

SELECT Description, DesignerCustomizationType, DiscoveryFrameworkUsageType, EmbeddedOmniScriptKey, IsActive, IsOmniScriptEmbeddable, Level, Name, OmniProcess.UniqueName, OmniProcessVersionNumber, ParentElement.OmniProcess.UniqueName, ParentElement.Name, ParentElementName, ParentElementType, PropertySetConfig, SequenceNumber, Type FROM OmniProcessElement

SELECT AssessmentQuestionVersion.Name, AssessmentQuestionVersion.AssessmentQuestion.UniqueIndex, AssessmentQuestionVersion.VersionNumber, IsPrefill, OmniProcess.UniqueName, OmniProcessElement.Name, OmniProcessElement.OmniProcess.UniqueName FROM OmniProcessAsmtQuestionVer
